mapper.select: SELECT MSG_SEQ , MSG_TYPE , BNKING_ID , ACCT_NO , INOUT_KIND , TRIM(BANK_NAME) AS BANK_NAME , TRIM(LONELY) AS LONELY , AMOUNT , BALANCE , TO_CHAR(SEND_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SEND_DATE FROM TMB_PUSHMSG WHERE BNKING_ID = #{bnkingId} AND APP_NO = '3' AND ( SEND_TIME >= TO_DATE(#{inqStrDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND SEND_TIME < TO_DATE(#{inqEndDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) AND MSG_TYPE = '01' ORDER BY SEND_TIME DESC, MSG_SEQ DESC
